name: AZQ Stage 3 Wave C Checks
purpose: Define task-specific automated checks for Stage 3 Wave C so the Codex runner can evaluate Agenda closeout work, including regression coverage and documentation alignment, without hardcoding Stage 3 logic into the runner.

baseline_checks.name: compileall
baseline_checks.description: Verify the azq package still compiles after the patch.

baseline_checks.name: agenda_storage_import
baseline_checks.description: Verify the Agenda storage facade still imports cleanly.

STAGE3-WAVEC-01.description: Add Stage 3 regression test suite for canonical Agenda storage and CLI flows.

checks.name: stage3_test_file_exists
checks.description: Verify the Stage 3 regression test file exists.

checks.name: stage3_regression_suite_discovery_run
checks.description: Verify the repository's standard unittest discovery command runs successfully with the Stage 3 regression suite present.

checks.name: stage3_test_file_covers_agenda_storage_and_cli_flows
checks.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('tests/test_stage3_wave_c.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8').lower()
required_groups = {
    'task_record_anchor': ['task', 'markdown'],
    'task_id_anchor': ['next_task_id'],
    'deliverable_validation_anchor': ['validate_parent_deliverable'],
    'dag_anchor': ['dag'],
    'agenda_build_anchor': ['agenda', 'build'],
    'agenda_list_anchor': ['agenda', 'list'],
    'agenda_show_anchor': ['agenda', 'show'],
    'agenda_dag_anchor': ['agenda', 'dag']
}
for name, snippets in required_groups.items():
    missing = [snippet for snippet in snippets if snippet not in text]
    assert not missing, f"{name}: missing {missing}"
PY
checks.description: Verify the Stage 3 regression suite includes coverage anchors for canonical Agenda storage and the live azq agenda command family without overfitting to one exact implementation shape.

human_checks: The new regression suite actually exercises canonical task markdown records, canonical DAG artifacts, deliverable-parent validation, and the live azq agenda build, list, show, and dag flow.
The tests stay centered on the current Stage 3 command surface rather than reopening task lifecycle mutation behavior that the live code does not expose.
If older `azq task` or `azq dag` names appear in test comments or context, they are clearly historical and are not treated as the required live command family.

STAGE3-WAVEC-02.description: Align Stage 3 documentation with the live Agenda baseline.

checks.name: readme_teaches_live_agenda_storage_and_commands
checks.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
for snippet in [
    'data/agenda/tasks/',
    'data/agenda/dags/',
    'data/agenda/logs/',
    'azq agenda build',
    'azq agenda list',
    'azq agenda show',
    'azq agenda dag'
]:
    assert snippet in text, snippet
PY
checks.description: Verify README.md teaches the live canonical Agenda storage model and command family.

checks.name: bootstrap_teaches_live_agenda_storage
checks.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('docs/architecture/AZQ_BOOTSTRAP.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
for snippet in [
    'data/agenda/tasks/',
    'data/agenda/dags/',
    'data/agenda/logs/'
]:
    assert snippet in text, snippet
assert 'Agenda' in text or 'agenda' in text, 'Agenda'
PY
checks.description: Verify docs/architecture/AZQ_BOOTSTRAP.md names the canonical Agenda artifact directories and treats Agenda as part of the live system.

checks.name: stage3_build_and_plan_docs_describe_live_agenda_baseline
checks.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
stage3_text = Path('planning/stage_3/overview.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
plan_text = Path('docs/architecture/AZQ_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
for text in (stage3_text, plan_text):
    for snippet in [
        'data/agenda/tasks/',
        'data/agenda/dags/',
        'data/agenda/logs/'
    ]:
        assert snippet in text, snippet
assert 'azq agenda' in stage3_text, 'azq agenda'
assert 'Agenda' in plan_text or 'agenda' in plan_text, 'Agenda'
PY
checks.description: Verify the Stage 3 build document and implementation plan describe the live Agenda storage baseline instead of only a pre-implementation plan.

human_checks: The docs teach the live Agenda baseline clearly instead of sounding like a future-only design note.
The rewritten documentation still uses the repository's craft vocabulary and does not read like a generated release note.
If any older `azq task` or `azq dag` wording remains for historical context, it is clearly constrained rather than presented as the live command surface.

README.md, docs/architecture/AZQ_BOOTSTRAP.md, planning/stage_3/overview.md, and docs/architecture/AZQ_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md all describe the current azq agenda build, list, show, and dag surface accurately enough for an operator to follow.
